column4: Identify the structure, pace requirements, rules, and support systems of the WWCC Digital Design program.
column12: Exceeds — Demonstrates thorough, accurate understanding of all program expectations
column14: Meets — Demonstrates accurate understanding of core program expectations
column16: Approaching — Demonstrates partial understanding; some gaps remain
column18: Beginning — Demonstrates minimal understanding of program expectations

column4: Create and maintain a professional, consistently named folder structure for digital design coursework.
column12: Exceeds — Folder structure is complete, correctly named, and clearly organized beyond requirements
column14: Meets — Folder structure is complete and correctly named
column16: Approaching — Folder structure is mostly complete with minor naming errors
column18: Beginning — Folder structure is incomplete or significantly incorrect
